response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The first song matched the provided 'Rivals and Equals' lyrics, and the duet segment matched 'I can't control myself' Japanese lyrics. 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON did not contain Calliope's spoken talk segment between the two songs (01:01 to 03:04), which was manually transcribed and translated. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed all lyrics closely to actual audio vocalizations, avoiding delays and ensuring precise transitions.

subtitles.original: Lightning never strikes twice in the same spot
subtitles.english: Lightning never strikes twice in the same spot

subtitles.original: So go ahead and run up on me till you get your shot
subtitles.english: So go ahead and run up on me till you get your shot

subtitles.original: I see the weapon that you're hiding, come on ready or not
subtitles.english: I see the weapon that you're hiding, come on ready or not

subtitles.original: Another life and you would never give a second thought
subtitles.english: Another life and you would never give a second thought

subtitles.original: Thinkin' your pride's different than mine
subtitles.english: Thinkin' your pride's different than mine

subtitles.original: Ticking all your vital signs off
subtitles.english: Ticking all your vital signs off

subtitles.original: But we still gotta protect all our friends from our enemies
subtitles.english: But we still gotta protect all our friends from our enemies

subtitles.original: Forged in fires of hell, god can't betray you
subtitles.english: Forged in fires of hell, god can't betray you

subtitles.original: If I'm a fallen angel, what does that make you?
subtitles.english: If I'm a fallen angel, what does that make you?

subtitles.original: I'm not debasing myself to see the same view
subtitles.english: I'm not debasing myself to see the same view

subtitles.original: When it's your pride on the line, no one can save you from mine
subtitles.english: When it's your pride on the line, no one can save you from mine

subtitles.original: Woo! This is... well thank... thank you!
subtitles.english: Woo! This is... well thank... thank you!

subtitles.original: 森カリオペです！Thank you so much everybody for coming to my birthday live!
subtitles.english: This is Mori Calliope! Thank you so much everyone for coming to my birthday live!

subtitles.original: UncutRock, right here, right here, right here!
subtitles.english: UncutRock, right here, right here, right here!

subtitles.original: Today's theme is obviously birthday, right?
subtitles.english: Today's theme is obviously birthday, right?

subtitles.original: If you look behind us, we've got stones!
subtitles.english: If you look behind us, we've got stones!

subtitles.original: What kind of stones, I wonder? Maybe birthday stones?
subtitles.english: What kind of stones, I wonder? Maybe birthday stones?

subtitles.original: Depending on the guest, I suppose. Mori Calliope's is diamond.
subtitles.english: Depending on the guest, I suppose. Mori Calliope's is diamond.

subtitles.original: Of course, you will see white behind me.
subtitles.english: Of course, you will see white behind me.

subtitles.original: Yes, and the idea is to sing original songs with guests,
subtitles.english: Yes, and the idea is to sing original songs with guests,

subtitles.original: and also my own songs. And...
subtitles.english: and also my own songs. And...

subtitles.original: I'm looking at the comments right now. Now, the show is in very high quality, so
subtitles.english: I'm looking at the comments right now. Now, the show is in very high quality, so

subtitles.original: there's like a pretty big lag, but I'm looking. Woo, woo!
subtitles.english: there's like a pretty big lag, but I'm looking. Woo, woo!

subtitles.original: Holy cannoli is right! こんばんは、こんばんは！
subtitles.english: Holy cannoli is right! Good evening, good evening!

subtitles.original: わあ、すごい！Happy birthday, happy birthday! Happy birthday wish, ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Wow, amazing! Happy birthday, happy birthday! Thank you so much for the birthday wishes!

subtitles.original: And you know what, behind me is not only stones,
subtitles.english: And you know what, behind me is not only stones,

subtitles.original: but I also have a fabulous band joining me!
subtitles.english: but I also have a fabulous band joining me!

subtitles.original: Thank you so much to the band for coming.
subtitles.english: Thank you so much to the band for coming.

subtitles.original: we have somebody Mori Calliope really respects.
subtitles.english: we have somebody Mori Calliope really respects.

subtitles.original: Today, Park-san is here with us!
subtitles.english: Today, Park-san is here with us!

subtitles.original: カリちゃん、ハッピーバースデー。
今日はよろしくお願いします。
subtitles.english: I look forward to working with you today.

subtitles.original: よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: I look forward to working with you, too!

subtitles.original: Park-san is one of my favorite bass players ever.
subtitles.english: Park-san is one of my favorite bass players ever.

subtitles.original: He's done two songs for me.
subtitles.english: He's done two songs for me.

subtitles.original: オルフェウスとセピアのベースやってくれました。
subtitles.english: He played the bass for 'Orpheus' and 'Sepia'.

subtitles.original: Park-sanはすごいリスペクトしてます。はい。
But I have so many wonderful members in the band today,
subtitles.english: But I have so many wonderful members in the band today,

subtitles.original: and I don't want to take up too much more time, but...
subtitles.english: and I don't want to take up too much more time, but...

subtitles.original: Anyway, we should probably sing with guests
subtitles.english: Anyway, we should probably sing with guests

subtitles.original: because I want to showcase all that we've been practicing together.
subtitles.english: because I want to showcase all that we've been practicing together.

subtitles.original: 世界で二人きりみたいだ
subtitles.english: It's like we're the only two in the world.
A hand that seems to reach...

subtitles.original: 戸惑い溢れてしまうよ
もう何度も繰り返した
subtitles.english: I've repeated this so many times,
I've repeated this so many times,
Without being able to connect the memories...
